message: I've been thinking about how heat waves sneak up on us—one day it's warm, the next it's genuinely uncomfortable. Turns out there's actually a lot of practical stuff we can do *before* things get intense, from keeping our homes cooler to staying hydrated in smart ways. Ready.gov has a whole resource on this that's super straightforward and honest. What's one heat-prep thing you've already figured out works for your family?
